landing.heroSubtitle: The all-in-one platform that connects clients with trusted service professionals. Book instantly, manage effortlessly, grow your business.
landing.featCalendarDesc: Clients see available times and book instantly. Professionals manage their schedule without phone calls.
landing.featClientsDesc: Visit history, favorite professionals, reminders. For specialists — full client profiles.
landing.featFinanceDesc: Professionals track revenue, expenses and profit. Clients see their spending and bonuses.
landing.featBookingDesc: Book via website or Telegram anytime. No calls, no waiting.
landing.featMarketingDesc: Automatic reminders, loyalty program, referral discounts for everyone.
landing.featInventoryDesc: Automatic material deduction per service, stock monitoring and timely restocking.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need, Nothing You Don't
landing.featuresSubtitle: Purpose-built tools for service professionals and the clients who love them.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up as a client or professional. Setup takes just a few minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Clients choose a specialist and time. Professionals add services and receive bookings.
landing.step3Desc: Easy booking, reminders, visit history and growth for your business.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Free for clients. Simple plans for professionals — starting at $12/mo.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of professionals who trust CRES-CA to manage their bookings, clients, and growth. Start free — no credit card required.
landing.platformDesc: From scheduling and client management to finances and marketing — all in one place. Works on web and inside Telegram.
landing.platformTelegram: Telegram Mini App — clients book right from their messenger
landing.platformMap: Map search — clients find professionals nearby
landing.statsSubtitle: Trusted by service professionals across the globe. Join them today.
landing.downloadAppDesc: Book unforgettable services in our mobile app
landing.forBusinessDesc: Grow your business with the leading platform for service companies
landing.bestPlatformDesc: One solution, one software. Trusted by industry leaders.

marketing.inviteAndEarn: Grow your client base with referrals
marketing.referralDesc: Share your unique link with potential clients. When they sign up and book, they are automatically linked to you.
marketing.stepShare: Share your invite link with potential clients
marketing.stepRegister: Client opens the link and registers
marketing.stepLinked: Client is automatically linked to you
marketing.automationDesc: Set up automatic reminders and follow-ups so your clients never miss an appointment.
marketing.automationBullet1: Send booking confirmations and reminders automatically
marketing.automationBullet2: Follow up after visits with care instructions or review requests
marketing.automationBullet3: Re-engage inactive clients with personalized messages
marketing.historyTitle: Stay connected and keep clients informed
marketing.historyDesc: Track every message sent to your clients. View delivery status and engagement history.
marketing.historyBullet1: View complete message history per client
marketing.historyBullet2: Track delivery and open rates for campaigns
marketing.historyBullet3: Send via Telegram, WhatsApp, email, or SMS
marketing.certificatesDesc: Create and manage gift certificates for your clients.
marketing.certificatesBullet1: Generate unique gift codes with custom amounts
marketing.certificatesBullet2: Clients can redeem certificates when booking
marketing.certificatesBullet3: Track redemption status and expiry dates
marketing.burningTitle: Fill empty slots with flash deals
marketing.burningDesc: Automatically offer last-minute discounts on unfilled time slots to maximize your revenue.
marketing.burningBullet1: System detects empty slots and creates promotions automatically
marketing.burningBullet2: Clients receive push notifications about nearby deals
marketing.burningBullet3: Set your own discount percentage and time window
marketing.reviewsTitle: Build your reputation with client reviews
marketing.reviewsDesc: Collect and showcase authentic client reviews to attract new customers.
marketing.reviewsBullet1: Automatic review requests sent after each visit
marketing.reviewsBullet2: Respond to reviews and build client trust
marketing.reviewsBullet3: Low ratings are kept private so you can improve
marketing.guildsDesc: Partner with other professionals for mutual client referrals.
marketing.guildsBullet1: Create a guild and invite complementary professionals
marketing.guildsBullet2: Recommend each other's services to your clients
marketing.guildsBullet3: Track referral bonuses across guild members
marketing.noGuilds: No guilds yet. Create one and invite other masters!

consent.title: Digital Consent Form
consent.agreeText: I have read and agree to the terms described above
consent.formBody:
I, the undersigned, confirm that:
1. I have been informed about the nature of the procedure.
2. I have disclosed all known allergies and medical conditions.
3. I understand the potential risks and expected outcomes.
4. I consent to proceed with the service described above.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing or using CRES-CA, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms.servicesText: CRES-CA provides a CRM platform for service industry professionals, including appointment scheduling, client management, financial tracking, and marketing tools.
terms.accountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account.
terms.paymentText: Service providers may subscribe to paid plans. Payments are processed securely through our payment partners. Subscription fees are billed monthly.
terms.terminationText: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms. You may cancel your subscription at any time.
terms.liabilityText: CRES-CA is provided as-is without warranties. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
terms.contactText: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@cres-ca.com or via Telegram @CresCASupport.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collectionText: We collect information you provide: name, email, phone number, and business details. We also collect usage data including device information and IP addresses.
privacy.useText: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, and maintain platform security. We do not sell your personal information.
privacy.sharingText: We share your information only with service providers necessary to deliver our platform (hosting, payment processing, analytics).
privacy.cookiesText: We use essential cookies for authentication and analytics cookies to understand platform usage. You can control cookie preferences through your browser.
privacy.securityText: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest, regular security audits, and access controls.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at support@cres-ca.com.
privacy.contactText: For privacy-related questions, contact us at support@cres-ca.com or via Telegram @CresCASupport.
